title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. borealis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. borealis, also known as northern kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant that is native to northern parts of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and vulnerary (wound-healing) effects. The health benefits of northern kidney vetch include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially providing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Northern kidney vetch is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues.
